title: Austria World Cup Review
original_text: Even though they didn't qualify in the last World Cup, Austria can genuinely give anyone a run for their money. Technically sound players with high work rate and discipline. Whether they have enough firepower up front when the knockout games tighten up is the acid test.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
